values.description: Base URL of the CustomBond application (server.port=8075, context-path=/api)
DXC Bearer token – automatically populated by the DXC Login request's test script
Default vendor identifier used across pipeline requests
Correlation UUID – auto-populated by the vendor /issue endpoint; update manually for direct DXC calls
Policy number returned by Quote Preparation; update after that call before calling Issue Quote / Issue Policy
Policy key (instnceKey) returned by Quote Preparation; used in Upload Document
